home.heroSubtitle: Elevating your most precious moments through artistic wedding & drone cinematography.
home.aboutHeading: We capture the unseen, the fleeting, the eternal.
home.aboutBody: Based in the heart of the mountains, we travel worldwide to document love stories with an editorial, frictionless approach. Using state-of-the-art drones and cinema cameras, your memories are crafted into timeless art.
home.contactSubtitle: Now booking for 2027 worldwide. Reach out to check availability and request our investment guide.

about.kicker: Independent filmmaker and drone cinematographer with an eye for the unseen.
about.bio1: I believe that every love story has its own unique rhythm and visual language. For over a decade, I've been documenting high-end weddings across the globe, blending cinematic techniques with raw, documentary-style observation.
about.bio2: My approach is frictionless — I want you to be fully present in your moments while I capture them from the ground and the sky. No awkward posing, just genuine connection, artfully framed.
